title: Building Blocks
headline: Building Blocks
subheadline: The foundational data infrastructure that powers every Tolemi solution.
body: BuildingBlocks is a map-based application that connects and updates data held in different systems and formats across departments & agencies. Your staff can find the answers they need in seconds, run advanced spatial analysis, and automate reports in a single interface.

features.title: One-click property data
features.description: A complete, up-to-date profile for every property in your municipality with information pulled automatically from any system or department.

features.title: Search and filter properties
features.description: Easy-to-use filters and search tools to quickly identify properties that meet specific criteria relevant to your work.

features.title: Research and link owners
features.description: Comprehensive data on every owner in your municipality in a single screen, and smart linking that identifies potentially related owners through shell LLC's.

features.title: Build and share reports
features.description: Customizable reports and data visualization tools, shareable through dashboards that automatically refresh when the data changes.

features.title: Set alerts
features.description: Get an email delivered to your inbox when properties meet custom-defined triggers so you can stay on top of changing conditions and stay ahead of the game.
